summary: Completed testing of revised tag-filtered leaderboard features. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend UI tests passed verifying: tag panel open shows all 250 papers, tag selection filters to ~7 papers, Global/Local toggle appears only with tags selected, Cat column shows category badges, category tabs grey out in tag mode, Clear all returns to category view.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/leaderboard?show_all=true&period=all returns 250 papers with primary_category field
Backend: GET /api/leaderboard?tags=physics.chem-ph&period=all returns 7 matching papers
Backend: GET /api/leaderboard?tags=physics.chem-ph&global_stats=true includes global_wins, global_comparisons, global_win_rate
Backend: global_comparisons >= comparisons for all papers with tags
Backend: show_all without tags returns all papers from all categories
Backend: tags param returns only matching papers (no show_all)
Backend: category param uses cached category leaderboard
Backend: Response fields include show_all, tags, tag_mode flags correctly
Backend: Multiple tags with OR mode returns union of papers
Frontend: Clicking 'Filter by tags' shows all 250 papers, title becomes 'All Papers'
Frontend: Category tabs grey out (opacity-40 pointer-events-none) when tag mode active
Frontend: Selecting tag filters to only matching papers (~7 for physics.chem-ph)
Frontend: Local/Global toggle appears ONLY when tags are selected
Frontend: Cat column visible in tag mode showing primary category badges
Frontend: Global toggle changes column headers to 'Win % (G)' and 'Mtch (G)'
Frontend: Global toggle changes match counts to global values
Frontend: Clear all returns to category view, tabs re-enabled, toggle hidden
Frontend: Tag panel can be closed while keeping tags selected - filter remains active
Frontend: Status bar shows correct counts (250 in all-papers mode, 7 in filtered mode)
Frontend: No dimming/opacity on paper rows in tag mode
Frontend: 'All categories' indicator shown in status bar when panel open with no tags
Frontend: 'Cross-category (OR)' indicator shown when tags selected
critical_code_review_comments: isTagMode logic (tagFilterOpen || hasSelectedTags) correctly determines tag mode state
show_all param without tags returns all papers via _compute_all_papers_leaderboard
tags param returns filtered papers via _compute_tag_leaderboard
Global/Local stats toggle only appears when hasSelectedTags is true
Category tabs correctly disabled with opacity-40 and pointer-events-none in tag mode
primary_category field correctly populated for all papers in tag/show_all modes
No dimming/opacity applied to individual paper rows (old behavior removed)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data: 250 total papers, physics.chem-ph has 7 papers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Revised tag-filtered leaderboard verified working. Key behaviors: 1) When 'Filter by tags' clicked (panel open, no tags), shows all 250 papers with Cat column. 2) When tags selected, filters to matching papers only. 3) Global/Local toggle appears only when tags selected - switches between local (within-set) and global (all matches) stats. 4) Category tabs grey out in tag mode. 5) Clear all returns to normal category view. Test file test_tag_mode_revised.py covers show_all without tags scenario.
